DISCOVERY 612, NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO INTERROGATORIES IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO RESPOND WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $236.30, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
